name: Impervious
description: While a unit with the Impervious keyword is defending, it rolls a number of extra defense dice during the Roll Defense Dice step equal to the total Pierce X value of weapons in the Attack Pool. If a unit with Impervious also has the Immune: Pierce keyword, then it does not roll extra defense dice for the Impervious keyword when defending against an attack with the Pierce X keyword.
official_rules_text: While a unit with the Impervious keyword is defending, it rolls a number of extra defense dice during the Roll Defense Dice step equal to the total Pierce X value of weapons in the Attack Pool. If a unit with Impervious also has the Immune: Pierce keyword, then it does not roll extra defense dice for the Impervious keyword when defending against an attack with the Pierce X keyword.
